body_txt: So you have a character in the shower (or bath) and they reach for a bar of soap. The soap proceeds to be very uncooperative, slipping out of the person's hands. Occasionally, it happens when someone is washing their hands. Often seen as part of a black comedy prison sexual abuse scene, or any time a Shower Scene gets Played for Laughs , really. (Especially when the victim slips when they're looking for the soap.) A bar of soap can also become a variant of a Banana Peel when stepped upon.
